attempt_local_note: Fourth bounded repair in the attempt-local B -> C1 -> C2 -> C3 -> C4 lineage. Materialized as C3's hash-bound repair child with the same minimal honest artifact set (adjudication, attribution, repaired tex, compile evidence, crops, provenance, regression, declared-boundary replay).

changes.label: grounded substrate (Panel E)
changes.change: restacked to two lines 'grounded'/'substrate' (align=right) + reposition anchor (1.10,2.48)->(1.05,2.50); no wording/font change

changes.label: sample (Panel E, sibling)
changes.change: nudged up y 2.72 -> 2.78 (+0.06 cm) into its own headroom to open the vertical band for the restacked label; x/anchor/text unchanged

left_open_unedited: grounded source return (Panel F, line 220) — permanently open, label vocabulary exhausted

measured_geometry_cm.method: pdftotext -bbox word boxes + check_panel_boundary_coverage frame lines. Bottom-row calibration global_x_pt = 28.3468*global_cm + 4.344; panel_x = (pt-4.344)/28.3468 - shift (E shift 5.0); panel_y = (457.75 - pt_top)/28.3468.

after_C4_two_line_stack.neighbor_note: the two internal gaps (0.038 to 'sample', 0.035 to the box border) are below the 0.08 guideline but are collision-free: no text_on_path/near_miss finding appears for 'substrate'/'grounded'/'sample' (see regression.json). The band is physically only 0.433 cm after the sample nudge, so 0.08+0.08 clearance is not achievable; collision-free was the binding gate.

panelF_grounded_source_return_open.verdict: no readable restack line fits between the referent and the frame; permanently open

compile.strict_failure_cause: check_visual_clash --strict, the same pre-existing failure carried from B/C1/C2/C3, unrelated to this label repair. undeclared_geometry stays 0.

evidence_crops.print_scale_note: Full figure at true publication width 155.9 mm rendered at 300 dpi.
evidence_crops.note: target crops are Panel E substrate region before(C3)/after(C4); neighbor crop is Panel F top-right showing the permanently-open 'grounded source return'.

human_review.note: Step 10: orchestrator issues the C4 development verdict under delegation (recorded separately). Panel F 'grounded source return' remains a declared-open defect for a future authoring/layout iteration.
